creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks for providing a new shar. I think I will `svn mv py-flup py-flup6` and update it to the fork as your shar.  Also, is it possible for you to help me check what are the other ports depend on py-flup and do they work with py-flup6?  If you can also provide me a patch which updates dependency line, that will be wonderful.
